creator: sheldonh@uunet.co.za
text:
Hi Arjan,

Could you see whether David's changes to the mutt port (see the message
below) fix the problem for you?

Ciao,
Sheldon.

------- Forwarded Message

From: "David E. O'Brien" <obrien@FreeBSD.ORG>
